name: Crepes Filled with Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
Crepes:
1. Combine eggs and salt.
2. Gradually add flour alternately with milk, beating with an electric mixer.
3. Beat in melted butter.
4. Refrigerate batter at least 1 hour.
5. Cool crepes in a single layer on absorbent paper.
Mousse:
1. Separate the eggs; place egg yolks in a bowl and four egg whites in a second bowl.
2. Melt chocolate over low heat.
3. Add yolks, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Blend in rum.
5. Remove from heat and cool slightly.
6. Beat 4 egg whites in the second bowl until frothy (do not attempt to beat all 8 together as it will not create enough volume).
7. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar to each bowl.
8. Beat until stiff peaks form.
9. Stir a small amount of whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
10. Combine and fold the remaining whites into the chocolate mixture.
11. Refrigerate.
Fill crepes with a dollop of whipped cream and a few sliced almonds.
